scripts.swarm: concurrently -n "INFRA,LINA,WEATHER,VIGIL,BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "gray,magenta,blue,yellow,green,cyan" "docker-compose up" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/lina/lina.py dev" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/weather_agent/weather_agent.py dev" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/vigil/vigil.py dev" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
